x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Reservable modules define the types of spaces Now Assist WSD can recommend. Without multiple module types, AI recommendations are limited in variety and cannot match employee preferences for different workspace types.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_rsv_reservable_module"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 3) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " reservable modules configured", finding: count + " reservable modules configured. Now Assist WSD can recommend across multiple space types including desks, meeting rooms, and amenity spaces." }; } else if (count >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " reservable module(s) configured", finding: "Only " + count + " reservable module(s) configured (target: 3+). Now Assist WSD AI recommendations will be limited to fewer space types." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No reservable modules configured", finding: "No reservable modules configured. Now Assist WSD cannot make AI space recommendations without defined reservable space types." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure reservable modules for each space type (desks, meeting rooms, focus rooms, etc.). Navigate to Workplace Service Delivery > Administration > Reservable Modules.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851cc9
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Reservable modules define the types of spaces Now Assist WSD can recommend. Without multiple module types, AI recommendations are limited in variety and cannot match employee preferences for different workspace types.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Reservable Module Configuration</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_rsv_reservable_module"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 3) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " reservable modules configured", finding: count + " reservable modules configured. Now Assist WSD can recommend across multiple space types including desks, meeting rooms, and amenity spaces." }; } else if (count >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " reservable module(s) configured", finding: "Only " + count + " reservable module(s) configured (target: 3+). Now Assist WSD AI recommendations will be limited to fewer space types." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No reservable modules configured", finding: "No reservable modules configured. Now Assist WSD cannot make AI space recommendations without defined reservable space types." }; } })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>WSD</module> <number>CHK0006228</number> <order>600</order> <remediation_guidance>Configure reservable modules for each space type (desks, meeting rooms, focus rooms, etc.). Navigate to Workplace Service Delivery > Administration > Reservable Modules.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>1e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851cc9</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
